summary: Tested Professeurs/Cursus renaming and Course-Cursus linking features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Admin panel UI verified via Playwright - 'Professeurs' replaces 'Savants' throughout, 'Cursus' replaces 'Thematiques' in sidebar, courses form has Cursus select field, courses table shows Cursus column.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed courses, professors, and cursus created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All renaming features implemented correctly: 'Savants' -> 'Professeurs' in all admin templates and dashboard stats, 'Thematiques' -> 'Cursus' in sidebar navigation. CourseCreate and CourseUpdate models include optional thematique_id field. Course form has Cursus dropdown, courses list shows Cursus column with thematique names. All 11 admin HTML templates verified.

details: Professors table displays correctly with CRUD operations
All 11 admin templates have 'Cursus' in navigation
Courses table has 'Cursus' column showing thematique names
thematique_id correctly saved and retrieved via API
